c_tabname VALUE 'ZABAPGIT' (20873); implementation 73157-73288 shows add(INSERT), delete(DELETE), list/list_by_keys/list_by_type/read(SELECT), modify(MODIFY), update(UPDATE) all on dynamic (c_tabname). All persistence DML uses the constant.

The lock mechanism is proven (73222 CALL FUNCTION 'ENQUEUE_EZABAPGIT'; 73235-73239 dummy get_update_function called IN UPDATE TASK with comment 'automatically release locks at commit'). But 'Every write' is overstated: add() (73158-73168) performs INSERT (c_tabname) WITHOUT calling lock(); only delete/modify/update lock.

Counted in 73157-73288: SELECTs = list 73201, list_by_keys 73207 (inside LOOP AT it_keys), list_by_type 73214, read 73261 = 4. INSERT 73167, DELETE 73177, MODIFY 73253, UPDATE 73282 = 1 each. Every line number matches.

Claim is explicitly about the file header: lines 1-27 literally contain REPORT, '* See http://www.abapgit.org' (3) and the full MIT License text ('The MIT License (MIT)', 'Copyright (c) 2014 abapGit Contributors'). Documentation observation verified against those lines; no code-behavior asserted from a comment.

The file actually has 152,997 physical lines: line 152997 is a separator '****...' with content and no trailing newline (awk NR=152997), while wc -l counts 152,996 newlines. The claim of 152,996 matches the newline count but undercounts the physical lines by one; an editor shows 152,997.

152471 cv_pass = p_pass on gv_confirm = abap_true, ELSE CLEAR cv_pass (152473); 152476 CLEAR p_pass after popup; PBO screen-invisible='1' for P_PASS (152506-152508). Flow parameter -> cv_pass shown.

73164 ls_table-value = iv_value - assignment from the non-DDIC method param iv_value of add(); kind 'computed' correct.

73165 ls_table-data_str = iv_data - assignment from method param (kind 'computed'). update() 73273-73277 routes XML (iv_data CS '<?xml') through validate_and_unprettify_xml, which calls zcl_abapgit_xml_pretty=>print iv_unpretty=abap_true (73292) before UPDATE; supplementary detail accurate.
